2606.26923.title: GAVEL: Grounded Caption Error Verification and Localization
2606.26923.paper_summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often produce hallucinated or inconsistent outputs, where text and images are not properly aligned. Addressing this issue requires not only detecting misalignment but also explaining the discrepancy and localizing its visual evidence. We introduce GAVEL (Grounded Caption Error Verification and Localization), a task that jointly addresses verification, explanation, and localization for image-text pairs. To support systematic evaluation, we also present a corresponding dataset and benchmark. We further train a supervised baseline on the human-annotated training split to assess whether GAVEL provides learnable supervision for these abilities. Experiments show that even strong closed-source models struggle on GAVEL, while the supervised baseline yields consistent improvements across grounding and explanation metrics.
2606.26923.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）經常產生幻覺或不一致的輸出，文本和圖像未能正確對齊。解決這個問題不僅需要檢測不對齊，還需要解釋差異並定位其視覺證據。我們介紹了 GAVEL（基於實體的標題錯誤驗證與定位），這是一個共同解決圖像-文本對的驗證、解釋和定位任務。為了支持系統評估，我們還提出了一個相應的數據集和基準。我們進一步在人工標註的訓練集上訓練了一個監督基線，以評估 GAVEL 是否為這些能力提供可學習的監督。實驗顯示，即使是強大的封閉源模型在 GAVEL 上也面臨挑戰，而監督基線在基於實體和解釋指標上則產生了一致的改進。
2606.26923.author: Zixian Gao et.al.
2606.26923.authors: Zixian Gao, Atsushi Hashimoto, Kuniaki Saito
